issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for API calls.
The skill is specific to AWS Bedrock and does not support other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: converse-simple-explanation
scenarios.rationale: Both responses omit the required Bedrock API call and token count output.

scenarios.name: knowledge-base-rag-refund-policy
scenarios.rationale: Response A correctly uses retrieve_and_generate and prints the answer, but the modelArn is incorrect; Response B does not use retrieve_and_generate or the correct modelArn at all.
